peekOfCode:
def upload_contacts(request, campaign_id):
    campaign = Campaign.objects.get(id=campaign_id)
    # campaign = Campaign.objects.get(id=campaign_id, user=request.user)
    csv_file = request.FILES["file"]
    reader = csv.DictReader(TextIOWrapper(csv_file, encoding="utf-8"))
    headers = reader.fieldnames or []
    variables = [h for h in headers if h != "phone"]
    # save variables on campaign
    campaign.variables = variables
    campaign.save(update_fields=["variables"])

def incoming_webhook(request):
    """Handle incoming SMS from Twilio"""
    from_ = request.POST.get("From")
    to = request.POST.get("To")
    body = request.POST.get("Body")
    sid = request.POST.get("MessageSid")
    print("INCOMING", from_)
    channel_name = get_client(to)
    if channel_name:
        channel_layer = get_channel_layer()

label: status_webhook
peekOfCode:
def status_webhook(request):
    """Handle message status updates from Twilio"""
    sid = request.POST.get("MessageSid")
    status = request.POST.get("MessageStatus")
    to = request.POST.get("To")
    print(f"Status webhook received: {sid} -> {status} for {to}")
    CampaignContact.objects.select_related("campaign").filter(
        message_sid=sid
    ).update(status=status)
    contact = CampaignContact.objects.select_related("campaign").filter(message_sid=sid).first()
